thread.title: Massive Hypocrite David Axelrod Bemoans Trump Possibly Politicizing the DOJ ... Just Like the Democrats
thread.title_full: Massive Hypocrite David Axelrod Bemoans Trump Possibly Politicizing the DOJ ... Just Like the Democrats

author: justmindy
title: Massive Hypocrite David Axelrod Bemoans Trump Possibly Politicizing the DOJ ... Just Like the Democrats
text:
David Axelrod took to Twitter to bemoan his fear Trump may politicize the DOJ. Major Eyeroll! Perhaps he forgets about all the times the Democrats have done just that?
Lost in the hubbub over the unqualified and morally-deficient Gaetz, his quick and heartening dispatch by the Senate
— David Axelrod (@davidaxelrod)[@GOP], and replacement by the more qualified but equally political[@PamBondi], is Trump's desire to make the DOJ his personal political instrument, reversing half a…[https://t.co/15hinHmLed][November 22, 2024]
Oh, how soon they forget!
Here is Eric Holder pictured with who he called, direct quote "His wingman" and "His boy"
— Stephen L. Miller (@redsteeze)[https://t.co/595AC5heVh][pic.twitter.com/mjYwbwA06I][November 22, 2024]
Oof!
lol do you ever take a minute to reflect on the insanely partisan behavior of Democratic AG’s?
— Chris Barron 🇺🇸 (@ChrisRBarron)[https://t.co/bREXfNKnFD][November 22, 2024]
They never see the plank in their own eye.
— Nick Dyer (@RealNickDyer)
[https://t.co/5nv9h4Wash][pic.twitter.com/5vAibUfkcT][November 22, 2024]
A picture speaks 1,000 words.
Lost in the hubbub Trump's desire to make the DOJ his personal political instrument, is how
— Charles Gasparino (@CGasparino)[@davidaxelrod]’s party weaponized the DOJ for political purposes to go after Trump when he was in office back in the day and while he was running for president. BTW these people really…[https://t.co/0oSHKjl6vm][November 22, 2024]
Recommended
Their hypocrisy is truly Biblical.
— john jackson (@pvtjokerus)
Shameless.[https://t.co/ZliM7K66BX][November 22, 2024]
The Bible also says 'to do unto others as you would have them do unto you', but the Democrats don't do that either.
Holder would like a word, idiot.
— JUST a GUY (@markbuc47)[https://t.co/pnhLPOYZ5N][November 22, 2024]
The same people trying to pretend Eric Holder, Obama's "wingman", didn't exist are the same people who pretend Obama's only scandal was a "tan suit."
— Deuce Boogaloo (@305Independent)[https://t.co/t1jKAocq3j][November 22, 2024]
"morally-deficient", coming from baby-killing, criminal-exonerating, literal law-breaking leftists.
— DoubtingThom (@graces_wretch)[https://t.co/ZIKpGBixwk][November 22, 2024]
The hypocrisy is astounding.
"I have willfully ignored the last two democratic administrations when making this analysis."
— Scott Paterno, Just a Guy (@ScottPaterno)[https://t.co/Z0TGfjBnd6][November 22, 2024]
Eyes wide shut.
Apolitical political appointments. Good one.
— sg (@latteconsrtve)[https://t.co/gyuh16hEdx][November 22, 2024]
Holder’s DoJ was Obama’s personal political instrument & David is well aware of it
— ben 🌐🏗️🏡 (@hayesy316)[https://t.co/ECrK1QrBld][November 22, 2024]
What's good for the goose is good for the gander.
— Nopenope (@Nopenop97515531)[https://t.co/B9YwBo8F4X][November 22, 2024]
They always think they'll remain in charge forever. They can't imagine they'll ever lose and then they do, and they realize the other side can do all the things they did.
David, is it your position that the DOJ has been non-political and 💯 neutral and independent the last 4 years?
— John E Deaton (@JohnEDeaton1)[https://t.co/8fkijD2lCd][November 22, 2024]
If his answer is yes, he needs an immediate reality check.
